title: rubus fruticosus var. suberectus
intro: Rubus fruticosus var. suberectus, also known as the suberect blackberry, is a variety of the blackberry plant that is characterized by its upright growth habit. The medicinal properties of Rubus fruticosus var. suberectus include its high content of anthocyanins, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of consuming Rubus fruticosus var. suberectus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, jam, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to support digestive and immune system health.
